value.description: MCP servers are configured either inline via the `mcpServers` option passed to `query()` in code, or loaded from a `.mcp.json` file via `settingSources`. Each server entry specifies a transport type (local process via `command`/`args`, or HTTP via `url`), and tools are selectively enabled using `allowedTools` with exact names or wildcards (e.g., `mcp__server-name__*`).
value.label: mcpServers / .mcp.json
